channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: South African Chef Redefines Dining with Indigenous Flavors
item.description: Karabo Molatsana, a 33-year-old sous chef at The Maslow Hotel in Sandton, is redefining Johannesburg's dining landscape by blending indigenous South African flavors with global culinary techniques. Bo...

item.title: Children's Health in the Digital Age: Key Concerns and Solutions
item.description: Health experts and child development specialists are raising urgent concerns about the impact of digital technology on children's wellbeing, calling for immediate protective measures as young people s...

item.title: Ronaldo Reflects on Future After Portugal's World Cup Exit
item.description: Cristiano Ronaldo, the legendary Portuguese footballer, has stated he won't rush into major life decisions after his team's exit from the 2026 World Cup. The 41-year-old, who confirmed this was his fi...

item.title: Helen Hunt on Her RSC Debut, Acting Challenges, and the Timelessness of Chekhov's The Cherry Orchard
item.description: Helen Hunt, an Oscar-winning actress, discusses her Royal Shakespeare Company debut in *The Cherry Orchard*, a play exploring class and entitlement. She reflects on the challenges of finding compellin...

item.title: Belgium Advances to Quarter-Finals After Defeating USA in World Cup Clash
item.description: Belgium delivered a crushing 4-1 victory over the USA in a FIFA World Cup round-of-16 clash, ending the Americans' hopes of reaching their first World Cup quarter-final in 24 years. The match, held at...

item.title: Duterte to Meet Defense Team at Senate, Avoids Impeachment Trial
item.description: President Rodrigo Duterte has confirmed he will meet his defense team at the Senate to discuss legal strategies regarding his impeachment trial, but he has decided not to attend the proceedings person...

item.title: Nairobi Senator Sifuna Launches New Political Party to Challenge ODM in 2027 Elections
item.description: Nairobi Senator Edwin Sifuna is at the center of a major political shift as he prepares to lead a mass exit from the Orange Democratic Movement (ODM) ahead of the 2027 General Election. Luhya leaders ...

item.title: Springbok Women Showcase Evolving Style in Historic US Victory
item.description: Assistant coach Laurian Johannes-Haupt highlighted the Springbok Women's growing attacking versatility after their 34-21 victory over eighth-ranked USA. While the team's dominant set-pieces remained k...

item.title: Near-Collision Between Scooter Rider and Toddler Sparks Debate on Shared Path Safety
item.description: A near-collision incident between an e-scooter rider and a toddler at Howard Smith Wharves in Brisbane has sparked debate about safety on shared paths. The incident, captured on TikTok, shows the ride...

item.title: Day 2 of Sara Duterte Impeachment Trial Focuses on Grave Threats Allegation and Initial Presentation of Evidence
item.description: The Senate impeachment trial of Vice President Sara Duterte entered its second day on July 7, 2026, with House prosecutors preparing to begin presenting evidence under Article IV of the Articles of Im...

item.title: Australia protests China's nuclear-capable missile test, urges transparency
item.description: Australia has formally protested China's recent test launch of a nuclear-capable intercontinental ballistic missile in the Pacific, with the United States also condemning the move. The Labor Party and...

item.title: Trump Claims Walmart Lowered Prices to Celebrate U.S. Semiquincentennial, Retailer Confirms Price Cuts
item.description: President Donald Trump asserted that Walmart Inc. agreed to lower prices for select products at his administration's request to commemorate the U.S. semiquincentennial (250th anniversary). The retaile...

item.title: Oil Tanker Hit by Unknown Projectile in Strategic Strait of Hormuz, Maritime Agency Reports
item.description: An oil tanker was struck by an 'unknown projectile' near the Strait of Hormuz, causing a fire, according to the UK Maritime Trade Operations (UKMTO). The incident occurred eight nautical miles east of...

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 PS5 Release Date Set for Second Half of 2026
item.description: Forza Horizon 6, the highly anticipated racing game, is set to release on PlayStation 5 in the second half of 2026, according to recent updates. This delay, which follows its initial launch on other p...

item.title: Nanotechnology offers solution to bacterial buildup in stored water
item.description: The article discusses how storing drinking water in containers can lead to the growth of harmful bacterial biofilms, which are difficult to eliminate with traditional disinfectants. Scientists are exp...

item.title: Blind UNILAG student overcomes brain tumour to become top JAMB candidate
item.description: Ogunsua-Dixon Tijesuni, a blind student at the University of Lagos (UNILAG), has defied all odds by becoming the top scorer in the Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board (JAMB) exam. Her journey has...

item.title: U.S. Goalkeeper's World Cup Ends in Heartbreaking Loss
item.description: Matt Freese's World Cup journey for the U.S. men's national team ended in heartbreak after a critical error during the tournament. Entering the competition as a key question mark in the squad, Freese'...

item.title: Kenya Police Set Up Checkpoints to Control Saba Saba Protests
item.description: Police in Kenya have announced enhanced security measures, including checkpoints across Nairobi, ahead of planned Saba Saba protests. The National Police Service (NPS) stated that these checkpoints ai...

item.title: Heavy Rains Disrupt Mumbai and Surrounding Areas, Schools Closed for Safety
item.description: The Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has declared all government, private, and civic-run schools and colleges in Mumbai closed on Tuesday, July 7, 2026, due to an 'orange' alert for heavy rain...

item.title: Ombudsman Dismisses Mao Aplasca Over Misconduct and Duty Neglect
item.description: The Ombudsman has officially dismissed Mao Aplasca from his position due to allegations of grave misconduct and neglect of duty. This decision comes after a thorough investigation into his actions, wh...
